versions.version_description: Not one of the 3 versions is correct. Link to the version tabbed: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eVli-tstM5E.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Dm9[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Am9[/ch]
[ch]Dm9[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]


[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]Dm9[/ch]                                 [ch]Em7[/ch]

[tab]           [ch]Am9[/ch]               [ch]Dm9[/ch]
Is it that sweet? I guess so[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]Em7[/ch]
Say you can't sleep, baby, I know[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am9[/ch]          [ch]Dm9[/ch]

[tab]                             [ch]Em7[/ch]
Say you can't sleep, baby, I know[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am9[/ch]

[tab]                                     [ch]Em7[/ch]
